segments.text: IM Bangalore is offering free online courses in collaboration with Swam portal. No entrance exam, no background
required. Anyone can apply. There are two courses. The first is advertising and sales. [music] This one teaches how brands actually sell, media planning,
copywriting and how sales strategies work in the real [music] world. The second is advertising and public relations. This focuses on storytelling,
brand reputation, digital PR, and how companies shape public [music]
perception. Now, here's why this matters. Marketing today is changing fast, attention spans are shrinking, and brands are fighting for trust. If you
[music] understand how advertising works and how reputation is built, you instantly become more valuable. Whether you're a student, creator, founder,
[music] or working professional, comment I I am, and I will DM you the course link.
